Title: Add session → device calendar integration

Description:
Allow users to add a session to their device calendar (iCal/.ics download or calendar intents for mobile). Provide an `.ics` export for single sessions.

Why:
Easy calendar integration improves user workflow and sync with personal schedules.

Acceptance criteria:
- Implement endpoint or client logic to generate an `.ics` file for a session.
- Add "Add to calendar" button on session details that triggers download or intent.

Labels: enhancement
